title: The Future Diary
sourceNotes: Single 26-episode TV anime (2011) faithfully adapting Sakae Esuno's complete manga (59 chapters / 12 volumes). Episode-to-chapter boundaries follow the manga's volume groupings and are approximate (the anime runs ~2.3 chapters per episode). The 'Redial' OVA is a short coda and a separate AniList entry.

mappings.arc: The Survival Game Begins (Yuki & Yuno; 3rd Diary Holder)
6th & 9th Diary Holders (the cult, the bomber Minene) and escape
4th, 7th & 8th Diary Holders (detective, the couple, the orphanage)
